moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Underway
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games are currently taking place in Glasgow, Scotland, running from July 23rd to August 2nd.

angles.name: Opening Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow is buzzing! The Commonwealth Games are in full swing, bringing incredible athletes and unforgettable moments to Scotland. Who are you backing for gold? #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Scottish Pride
angles.copy: The eyes of the Commonwealth are on Glasgow! So proud to see our city hosting the Games and showcasing the very best of Scottish spirit. What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: AIG Women's Open Approaches
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of golf's five major championships, is set to tee off from July 29th to August 2nd at Royal Lytham and St Annes in England.

angles.name: Golf Major
angles.copy: Ready for some world-class golf? The AIG Women's Open, a major championship, starts next week at Royal Lytham and St Annes!

angles.name: Lancashire Links
angles.copy: The best female golfers in the world are heading to Lancashire next week for the AIG Women's Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes. Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: T100 Triathlon Hits London
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon will be held in London this weekend, running from July 25th to 26th.

angles.name: London Triathlon
angles.copy: Get ready for an epic weekend in London! The T100 Triathlon is here, bringing incredible endurance action to the capital. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Endurance Challenge
angles.copy: Swim, bike, run! The T100 Triathlon is on this weekend in London – an amazing display of human endurance. Good luck to all competitors!

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival Rocks Wales
moments.blurb: The Steelhouse Festival, a prominent rock event, is taking place this weekend, July 24th-26th, in Ebbw Vale, Wales.

angles.name: Welsh Rock
angles.copy: The mountains are alive with the sound of rock! Steelhouse Festival kicks off today in Ebbw Vale – who's heading up the hill for a weekend of riffs?

angles.name: Weekend Headbanging
angles.copy: It's finally here! Steelhouse Festival is bringing huge rock acts to Wales all weekend. Get ready to headbang!

moments.title: Together Again Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: The Together Again festival, featuring Ministry of Sound Classical, James Arthur, and Becky Hill, is running from July 24th-26th in Tattenhall, UK.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Who's at Together Again Festival this weekend? Ministry of Sound Classical, James Arthur, Becky Hill and more are set to light up Tattenhall!

angles.name: Dance Classics
angles.copy: Ministry of Sound Classical live this weekend at Together Again Festival! Get ready for those iconic tracks with a full orchestra.

moments.title: Reading & Leeds Festival Line-up Buzz
moments.blurb: The line-ups for Reading & Leeds Festivals 2026 (August 27-30) are generating buzz, featuring headliners like Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine, and Raye.

angles.name: Festival Anticipation
angles.copy: Reading & Leeds line-ups are looking HUGE! Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine... who are you most excited to see this August?

angles.name: Lineup Drop
angles.copy: Still buzzing about the Reading & Leeds line-up! From pop to grime, it's packed. Have you got your tickets yet?

moments.title: UK Summer Heat Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a prolonged period of warm weather, with temperatures remaining high across much of England and Wales this July.

angles.name: Heatwave Check-in
angles.copy: Another warm one across the UK today! How are you keeping cool in the summer heat?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Loving this long stretch of sunshine! Perfect for those summer plans, but remember to stay hydrated. What's your favourite way to beat the heat?
